Uses of Class
com.irurueta.geometry.TriangulatorException

  • Packages that use TriangulatorException 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.geometry
    This package contains classes to work with basic geometric entities such as 2D or 3D points, lines, planes, 2D or 3D triangles or polygons, circles, spheres, rotations, transformations etc.

    • Uses of TriangulatorException in com.irurueta.geometry

      Methods in com.irurueta.geometry that throw TriangulatorException 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      java.util.List<Triangle2D> Polygon2D.getTriangles()
      Returns a list of triangles forming this polygon.
      java.util.List<Triangle3D> Polygon3D.getTriangles()
      Returns a list of triangles forming this polygon.
      private static java.util.List<Triangle2D> VanGoghTriangulator2D.internalTriangulate​(java.util.List<Point2D> verticesCopy, java.util.List<int[]> indices, java.util.List<Point2D> originalVertices)
      Internal method that computes the actual triangulation.
      private static java.util.List<Triangle3D> VanGoghTriangulator3D.internalTriangulate​(java.util.List<Point3D> verticesCopy, java.util.List<int[]> indices, java.util.List<Point3D> originalVertices)
      Internal method that computes the actual triangulation.
      boolean Polygon2D.isInside​(Point2D point)
      Determines if provided point lies within the region defined by this polygon.
      boolean Polygon2D.isInside​(Point2D point, double threshold)
      Determines if provided point lies within the region defined by this polygon.
      boolean Polygon3D.isInside​(Point3D point)
      Determines if provided point lies within the region defined by this polygon.
      boolean Polygon3D.isInside​(Point3D point, double threshold)
      Determines if provided point lies within the region defined by this polygon.
      void Polygon2D.triangulate()
      Triangulates this polygon using this polygon's triangulator method.
      void Polygon3D.triangulate()
      Triangulates this polygon using this polygon's triangulator method.
      abstract java.util.List<Triangle2D> Triangulator2D.triangulate​(Polygon2D polygon)
      Triangulates provided polygon by dividing it into a set of triangles.
      abstract java.util.List<Triangle2D> Triangulator2D.triangulate​(java.util.List<Point2D> vertices)
      Triangulates a polygon formed by provided vertices.
      abstract java.util.List<Triangle2D> Triangulator2D.triangulate​(java.util.List<Point2D> vertices, java.util.List<int[]> indices)
      Triangulates a polygon formed by provided vertices.
      abstract java.util.List<Triangle3D> Triangulator3D.triangulate​(Polygon3D polygon)
      Triangulates provided polygon by dividing it into a set of triangles.

      Triangulates a polygon formed by provided vertices.

      Triangulates a polygon formed by provided vertices.

      Triangulates provided polygon by dividing it into a set of triangles.

      Triangulates a polygon formed by provided vertices.

      Triangulates a polygon formed by provided vertices.
